title: Deprecate graph nodes from Procedures dashboard and schema
description: Implement removal of GraphNode from Procedures UI/schema/runtime, move Procedures metrics to procedures+chatSessions, and remove procedure-node MCP/tooling surfaces. Legacy graph-node Procedure records are intentionally unsupported after this change.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Kickoff: implementing graph-node deprecation end-to-end. Context linked from prior Procedures dashboard task plx-da791c (runs-first Tactus flow). Scope in this task: remove GraphNode UI and schema usage, switch Procedures gauges to procedures+chatSessions, remove procedure-node MCP and Lua graph-node/session-node persistence surfaces, and clean graphNodes metrics aggregation paths. Legacy graph-node Procedure records are intentionally unsupported after landing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation progress update (context: plx-da791c): removed procedure graph-node UI/components/queries/metrics wiring; removed GraphNode and rootNodeId/nodeId fields from Amplify schema resource; removed MCP procedure-node registration and deleted MCP/tools/procedure/procedure_nodes.py; removed Lua GraphNode primitive plus Session.load_from_node/save_to_node and added explicit YAML parser validation for deprecated graph-node tokens; converted ProcedureService create/info/update/delete to procedure-record/chat-session model (no root-node creation/deletion); updated MCP/CLI procedure outputs/docs to drop root/node/version fields. Verification: dashboard typecheck passed (Node 18.19 via nvm), targeted dashboard Jest passed, MCP procedures tests passed, procedure service/session parser tests passed, MCP server --help startup passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation note: dashboard typecheck/Jest and Python targeted suites pass. Amplify GraphQL client generation could not be executed locally because ampx generate graphql-client-code requires a deployed stack/app context; the command failed with StackDoesNotExistError for sandbox stack id amplify-awsamplifygen2-ryan-sandbox-e9d5ef3fc4.
